diagrams.title: Forward Chaining Architecture
diagrams.description: Shows the components of a forward chaining expert system and their interactions
diagrams.purpose: Understanding system structure and data flow

diagrams.title: Match-Select-Execute Cycle
diagrams.description: The iterative process of the inference engine

diagrams.title: Forward vs Backward Chaining Direction
diagrams.description: Comparison of reasoning directions in both approaches
elements: Forward: Facts → Rules → Conclusions (left to right)
Backward: Goal ← Rules ← Facts (right to left)

diagrams.title: Chaining Effect Example
diagrams.description: Shows how one rule's conclusion becomes another rule's premise
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how chaining works through rule sequences
